name: cy.request
manual_notes: DELETE/backend cleanup request is eligible cleanup/restore state.

name:
cy.fetchCsrf()
    .request({
      url: "/api/v1/auth/login",
      method: "POST",
      body: { email, password },
      log: false,
    })
    .fetchCsrf

manual_notes: Auth/session mutation appears in afterEach; phase as teardown is acceptable due hook placement, intent as auth_session_state is acceptable.
